ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the order */,
  "shipping_address_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shipping address for the order */,
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the payment method used */,
  "order_status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the current status of the order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was last updated */,
  "shipping_method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shipping method used */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated delivery date of the order */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual delivery date of the order */,
  "order_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_order_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_status_id") REFERENCES order_status ("order_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_shipping_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipping_method_id") REFERENCES shipping_methods ("shipping_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_payment_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_id") REFERENCES payments ("payment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Transaction ID from the payment gateway */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount paid */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., success, pending, failed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment was processed */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment status was last updated */,
  "payment_gateway" TEXT /* Payment gateway used (e.g., Stripe, PayPal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order item was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order item was last updated */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_status" (
  "order_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the order status (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the order status */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the status was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was last updated */,
  "product_image" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the product category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, admin, support) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_methods" (
  "shipping_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping method */,
  "shipping_method_name" TEXT /* Name of the shipping method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the shipping method */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the shipping method was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the shipping method was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order being logged */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date of the log entry */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message describing the log entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_logs_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)
